description_long: This is a full-sized axe featuring a robust, slightly curved wooden handle with a darkened grip area and a subtle gradient of reddish-brown to greenish hues along its length. The handle appears ergonomically shaped for comfortable two-handed use, with a rounded cross-section and a textured surface for improved grip. The axe head is forged from metal, presenting a broad, wedge-shaped blade with a straight cutting edge and a pronounced poll on the opposite side, suitable for splitting or chopping tasks. The blade is securely mounted to the handle, with the eye of the axe head fitting tightly around the top of the handle, suggesting a traditional wedged mounting style. The metal head has a matte, slightly worn finish, indicating frequent use or exposure to the elements. No visible brand markings or decorative engravings are present on either the handle or the blade.
description: A full-sized axe with a curved, textured wooden handle and a broad, wedge-shaped metal blade. The handle features a darkened grip and the blade has a matte, utilitarian finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the axe, highlighting the curved handle and the broad, wedge-shaped blade.
description_view_1: Top-down view emphasizing the narrow profile of the blade and the oval cross-section of the handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the handle's gradient coloration and the blade's thickness.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view showing the handle's end and the alignment of the blade with the handle.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with a rounded cross-section, darkened grip, and textured surface for secure holding.
attribute_blade_design: Broad, wedge-shaped steel blade with a straight cutting edge and a pronounced poll; single-edged with a utilitarian, matte finish.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with the blade eye fitted tightly over the handle.
